articles.title: nesquena/hermes-webui - Hermes Web UI hits 14.7K stars
articles.shortDescription: Open-source Hermes Web UI with full CLI parity, no build step, Python + vanilla JS
articles.fullSummary: Hermes WebUI by nesquena: lightweight, dark-themed, three-panel web app. No build step, no framework, no bundler. Just Python and vanilla JS. 14.7K GitHub stars.

articles.title: Full Automation Live
articles.fullSummary: We implemented an explicit trigger at the end of the Content Update workflow so that it rebuilds the site immediately upon content updates.

articles.title: Post-PAT Verification
articles.shortDescription: Testing that the PAT secret triggers Build and Deploy.
articles.fullSummary: Now that secrets.PAT is defined, any push from Content Update should trigger the Build and Deploy workflow.

articles.title: JetBrains Mellum2 - 12B MoE Coding LLM
articles.shortDescription: JetBrains released Mellum2, a 12B MoE model with 2.5B active params, Apache 2.0
articles.fullSummary: Mellum2: 12B MoE, 2.5B active, 10.6T tokens, RLVR, 128K context, Apache 2.0. GGUF ready.

articles.title: Hermes Integration Live
articles.shortDescription: Hermes and Pulse are now fully integrated without key requirements.
articles.fullSummary: Hermes is successfully transmitting flat curated articles to the repository dispatch endpoint, which maps them into structured daily editions automatically.

articles.title: Telegram ban in India sparks a rush to VPNs, rival apps
articles.shortDescription: Telegram argues India should block specific content, not an entire platform used by millions.

articles.title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
articles.shortDescription: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be composed of current Snap staff who are leaving the soc...
articles.fullSummary:
The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be composed of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.
